narrative:
Beavercreek 092 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,874 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
